---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: "[doc] "
labels: documentation
assignees: spatchava
---

## Document or location

Path to the doc or section (e.g. `README.md`, `DESIGN.md`, `android/README.md`,
`backend/README.md`, in-code KDoc/docstring).

## Issue

What is wrong, missing, or unclear?

## Suggested change

Concrete proposal, if you have one.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues.
